calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-14-2021 Vacated
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of [Proposed] Consent Judgment

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2020 Set For Trial On Aug-09-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-23-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MONOPRICE, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST Amended COMPLAINT:

Defendant Monoprice, Inc.'s motion to strike plaintiff's first amended complaint (FAC) is denied. Plaintiff's complaint, liberally construed, alleges that users are exposed to styrene when Monoprice's 3D printers are used with the styrene-based filaments. (See FAC 1-2 [alleging that defendants' 3D printers are "intended to be used with filaments incorporating a styrene monomer"].) The truth of the allegation that 3D printers do emit or release toxins into the environment is not a question to be decided on a motion to strike. The court finds the FAC properly alleges Monoprice's 3D printers are subject to the warning requirements of Proposition 65. Additionally, plaintiff's request for relief is not improper. Health and Safety Code Section 25249.11(f) does not necessarily prohibit a court from requiring individual warnings as a remedy for a violation-the statute simply states that the required warning may be provided by other general methods. If a court determines that a defendant has failed to comply with the statutory requirement of a "clear and reasonable" warning, it has broad powers to remedy such a violation. (See Health & Safety Code 25249.7(a) [a person who violates or threatens to violate section 25249.5 or 25249.6 may be enjoined in any court of competent jurisdiction]; see generally People ex rel. Lungren v. Superior Court (1996) 14 Cal.4th 294, 314 [Proposition 65 is a remedial statute that must be construed broadly to accomplish its protective purpose].

order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2020 Continued To Sep-09-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
